# FSItem.Attributes

**Class**

Attributes of an item, such as size, creation and modification times, and user and group identifiers.

## Declaration

```swift
class Attributes
```

## Overview



## Validating and invalidating attributes

- **isValid(_:)**: Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether the attribute is valid.
- **invalidateAllProperties()**: Marks all attributes inactive.

## Working with identifier attributes

- **fileID**: The item’s file identifier.
- **parentID**: The identifier of the item’s parent.

## Working with metadata attributes

- **type**: The item type, such as a regular file, directory, or symbolic link.
- **mode**: The mode of the item.
- **linkCount**: The number of hard links to the item.
- **uid**: The user identifier.
- **gid**: The group identifier.
- **flags**: The item’s behavior flags.
- **size**: The item’s size.
- **allocSize**: The item’s allocated size.
- **supportsLimitedXAttrs**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the item supports a limited set of extended attributes.
- **inhibitKernelOffloadedIO**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the file system overrides the per-volume settings for kernel offloaded I/O for a specific file.

## Working with time attributes

- **accessTime**: The item’s last-accessed time.
- **modifyTime**: The item’s last-modified time.
- **changeTime**: The item’s last-changed time.
- **birthTime**: The item’s creation time.
- **backupTime**: The item’s last-backup time.
- **addedTime**: The item’s added time.

## Working with attributes

- **FSItem.GetAttributesRequest**: A request to get attributes from an item.
- **FSItem.SetAttributesRequest**: A request to set attributes on an item.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Inherited By

- FSItem.SetAttributesRequest

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCoding
- NSObjectProtocol
- NSSecureCoding
